name: Type 2 Diabetes - Abnormal Lab Query
description: Tests ability to find patients with elevated hemoglobin A1c lab results indicating diabetes. This covers PheKB algorithm paths 3 and 4 where abnormal lab values are required evidence. Tests whether the LLM can construct a value-based Observation query with proper LOINC codes and thresholds.
prompt: Find all hemoglobin A1c lab results that are at or above 6.5 percent, which is the diagnostic threshold for diabetes mellitus.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with abnormal HbA1c >= 6.5%. Tests value-quantity search on Observations. The hardest query type because it requires both the right LOINC code AND a value filter.

required_codes.display: Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by HPLC
Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by Electrophoresis
Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by calculation
